sourceMovie.title: Braindead
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Braindead works as a horror movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The horror and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Zombieland: Double Tap
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Braindead clicked for you, Zombieland: Double Tap (2019) is a strong next stop: both trade in horror and comedy, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Braindead?
faq.answer: Try Zombieland: Double Tap, What We Do in the Shadows, Slither—each shares DNA with Braindead while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Braindead?
faq.answer: Braindead (1992) is best described as Horror, Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Braindead worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.4/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this horror lane.
